code:
import io
import string

let opt = io.read_line()
let line = match opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut p = 0
mut neg = 0
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if in_num
      let v = sign * cur
      if v > 0
        p = p + v
      else if v < 0
        neg = neg + v
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let v = sign * cur
  if v > 0
    p = p + v
  else if v < 0
    neg = neg + v
  end
end

let r = p - neg
print("r=#{r}")
